exemplar.title: How do William Goldingâs experiences shape his perspective on human nature as demonstrated through authorial choices in Lord of the Flies?

detailedExemplarData.title: How do William Goldingâs experiences shape his perspective on human nature as demonstrated through authorial choices in Lord of the Flies?

subject.title: English Lang & Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Language & Literature combines the study of language and literature, analyzing both literary and non-literary texts across various media and contexts. Students explore how language shapes meaning, identity, and culture through critical examination of diverse text types including advertisements, speeches, novels, and digital media. The course develops analytical skills, cultural understanding, and critical thinking about communication in different contexts and purposes.

strengths: Clear statement and constant reinforcement of the research question
Adequate communication of topic throughout introduction, body, and conclusion
weaknesses: Methodology is minimal with no rationale for source selection
Discussion often drifts into plot summary, reducing focus and precision
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Strand scores of 3, 3 and 2 (topic clarity; research question focus; methodology) place this work solidly in the 3â4 band overall. The research question is clearly stated and sustained, but the lack of methodological rigor and recurrent summary weaken the sense of sharp purpose. A holistic score of 3 reflects adequate but not consistently effective focus and method.

strengths: Good familiarity with Lord of the Flies and accurate biographical facts
Mostly appropriate use of key literary terms (symbolism, allegory, conflict)
weaknesses: Heavy reliance on popularâlevel web sources limits academic depth
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Both strands (knowledge of topic and sources; use of terminology) were assessed in the 3â4 band. The student demonstrates solid understanding and generally correct terminology yet falls short of excellent due to limited source credibility and minor imprecisions. A holistic score of 3 reflects âgoodâ rather than âexcellentâ performance.

strengths: Effective biographicalâtoâsymbolic connections (e.g. naval service and the conch/glasses)
Compelling historical analogies (Jackâs rule vs. Nazi Germany)
Wellâsupported close readings in key sections (foreshadowing, pigâs head symbolism)
weaknesses: Overreliance on assertion without precise textual or scholarly support
Limited engagement with counterarguments or source reliability
Repetitive conclusions and cursory evaluation of evidence
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three CT strandsâresearch relevance, analysis depth, and discussion/evaluationâfell into the 4â6 band. While several analyses are effective and coherent, the lack of critical evaluation, counterpoints, and varied scholarly sources holds the work back from the upper band. Awarding 5 out of 12 reflects a performance slightly above the lower-middle of the band.

strengths: Includes required structural elements (title page, word count, contents, pagination)
Basic organizational logic with introduction, body, conclusion in place
weaknesses: Inconsistent inâtext citation style and formatting errors in the worksâcited list
Uneven paragraphing and unconventional section headings hinder coherence
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Both presentation strands were assessed in the 1â2 band. The candidate meets core requirements but exhibits lapses in citation consistency, section labeling, and formatting details. A score of 2 reflects a generally appropriate structure and layout that falls short of full effectiveness.

strandSelections.reasoning: Apart from listing secondary websites and the primary novel, the student supplies no explanation of how sources were chosen or how they will be used; there is no methodological outline or reference to any critical approach.  The bibliography consists largely of general internet articles with limited academic credibility.  Evidence of informed selection is therefore minimal, fitting the 1â2 band.

Page numbers, word count and title are present, satisfying several required layout criteria.  Nonetheless, in-text citations are inconsistent (mixing parenthetical references and incomplete attributions) and the works-cited list shows formatting errors and broken URLs.  These lapses indicate that some layout conventions are âmissing or incorrectly applied,â placing the work in the 1â2 band.

The investigation cites several secondary commentaries, the authorised edition of the novel, and a handful of web articles, giving an âadequateâ body of research.  Most references relate to the research question, though many are descriptive rather than analytical.  The breadth and relevance are therefore typical of the 4â6 band but sit toward its lower end.

The student clearly states that the essay will examine âhow William Goldingâs experiences shape his perspective on human nature as demonstrated through authorial choices in Lord of the Flies.â  This focus is reiterated in the introduction, throughout the section headings and again in the conclusion, so the reader can follow the intention of the study without difficulty.  Nevertheless, the discussion frequently drifts into long plot summary and general biography, so the sense of sharp purpose is only âadequate,â not consistently âaccurate and effective.â  These characteristics are typical of the 3â4 band.

An overall line of argument is presentâGoldingâs negative view of human nature stems from war and teaching experienceâbut evaluation of evidence is cursory; the student seldom questions source reliability or considers counter-arguments.  The discussion is coherent yet not truly critical, satisfying the descriptors for âgoodâ (4â6) but not reaching the higher bands.

The student moves beyond mere narration by connecting Goldingâs war service to specific symbols (conch, glasses, pigâs head).  However, the argument often rests on assertion rather than close quotation, and alternative readings are not engaged.  Conclusions are âmostly supportedâ but sometimes repetitive, which keeps the work in the middle of the 4â6 range.

The essay contains the required elements (title page with word count, contents page, introduction, body, conclusion, works cited).  Paragraphing is uneven and some section divisions (e.g., âHuman Nature Part 1 / Part 2â) do not follow the conventional EE chapter structure.  Overall structure is âgenerally appropriateâ but not fully effective, fitting the 1â2 band.

The student shows sound familiarity with Lord of the Flies and can recount key moments (conch breaking, Piggyâs glasses, pigâs head).  Basic biographical facts about Golding and WWII are accurate.  Nonetheless, the essay relies on a small pool of largely popular-level sources and tends to repeat the same information rather than extend it.  Knowledge is therefore âgoodâ but not âexcellent.â

Literary terms such as symbolism, foreshadowing, internal/external conflict and allegory are used mostly correctly and in appropriate contexts.  Terminology is not always precise (e.g., âintuitionâ for âintellectâ) but errors do not impede meaning.  Consistency is acceptable but not seamless, matching the 3â4 band.

The research question is explicitly phrased as an inquiry into the link between Goldingâs life and his portrayal of human nature.  It is narrow enough to be answerable within an EE and remains visible in every major section.  However, the question is still treated rather broadlyââGoldingâs experiencesâ are handled in sweeping terms (only teaching and naval service) and the literary analysis stays generalâso the focus is only partially refined.  This places the work solidly in the middle band.

annotations.comment: The research question is clearly stated and well-integrated into the introduction, establishing a focused inquiry into Goldingâs experiences and authorial choices in Lord of the Flies.
The inclusion of a precise word count demonstrates adherence to IB formatting requirements, ensuring the investigation remains within the prescribed limit.
Consider consolidating the split title into a single cohesive heading to improve visual impact and maintain consistency on the title page.
This section leans heavily on plot summary without analytical commentary; refocus by introducing critical insights or context that directly support your research question.
In-text citations are inconsistently formatted; adopt a consistent citation style (e.g., MLA) including page numbers or authorâdate formats for all references.
The section effectively identifies Goldingâs naval and teaching experiences, establishing a strong foundation to explore their influence on his narrative choices.
The essay lacks a methodological overview; include a clear methodology section outlining your criteria for source selection and analytical approach to strengthen focus and rigour.
The Table of Contents is present, but adding leader dots and aligning entries more consistently would enhance navigation and presentation.
The opening quote from Ansel Adams feels tangential; strengthen the introduction by linking this quotation directly to Goldingâs perspective or selecting a more pertinent literary attribution.
The assertion that Golding âmust have understoodâ human nature via naval service is speculative; support this claim with specific evidence or scholarly sources for validity.
The parallel drawn between Goldingâs naval experiences and the boysâ descent into savagery demonstrates effective critical connection between biographical context and literary elements.
Reliance on popular-level web sources limits academic depth; incorporate peer-reviewed journal articles or literary criticism to enhance the credibility of your analysis.
The concluding sentence here is repetitive; consider synthesizing the insights into a more concise summary to maintain narrative momentum.
The analogy between Jackâs authoritarian rule and Nazi Germany offers a compelling historical perspective that strengthens the relevance of your argument.
The claim that Goldingâs wartime experiences âdemonstrateâ certain perspectives requires support via precise textual analysis or critical commentary to avoid overgeneralization.
Transitions between discussion of external and internal conflict would benefit from clearer topic sentences to improve structural coherence.
This summary effectively synthesizes how the teaching and naval experiences collectively shaped Goldingâs narrative perspective.
The section header âHuman Nature Part 1â is vague; consider a descriptive title (e.g., âSymbolism of Piggyâs Glassesâ) to clarify analytical focus.
The analysis of Piggyâs glasses would be stronger if you acknowledged alternative readings or counterarguments to demonstrate critical evaluation.
Linking Piggyâs glasses to wartime breakdowns in logic offers a nuanced perspective that enriches your symbol analysis.
The conch analysis is conceptually sound but would be more convincing with precise quotations and deeper examination of language choices.
The linkage of the shattered conch to political conflict in World War II exemplifies a thorough and relevant allegorical analysis.
The reference to âmany other authorial choicesâ is vague; specify particular techniques or refine focus to avoid ambiguity.
This foreshadowing analysis is well-supported by direct quotations, demonstrating effective close reading and linking to the research question.
Consider splitting this section into shorter paragraphs to improve readability and maintain a clear focus on distinct analytical points.
The succinct conclusion on foreshadowing effectively encapsulates its role and connection to Goldingâs experiences.
Integrate perspectives from scholarly criticism on the pigâs head symbol to deepen your evaluative discussion and strengthen critical engagement.
This reflection clearly articulates how the pigâs head symbolizes the boysâ descent into savagery, reinforcing your thematic argument.
The conclusion effectively restates your thesis, but integrating a brief counterargument or addressing potential limitations would enhance critical depth.
The Works Cited list contains formatting inconsistencies (e.g., missing italics, inconsistent URL presentation); revise entries to adhere strictly to MLA style guidelines.
The bibliography relies heavily on popular web sources; include peer-reviewed journals or academic monographs to strengthen the investigationâs scholarly underpinning.
